title: glandora rosmarinifolia
intro: Glandora rosmarinifolia, also known as Rock Rose or Pineapple Flower, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate congestion, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems, while its essential oil is also used to repel insects and improve mood. Herbal preparations of Glandora rosmarinifolia include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
